modelInfo.name: Apple Park Ring Segment (TFP Isolated)
modelInfo.description: One of nine independent wedge segments of the Apple Park ring building in Cupertino, CA. 4-story precast concrete structure on EPS Triple Friction Pendulum isolators. Based on the real building: 1,532 ft outer diameter, 180 ft ring width, 692 TFP bearings with 52-inch displacement capacity. Designed by Foster + Partners with Arup as structural engineer.
